result.reason: Implement support for importing .moba files from MobaXTerm to enhance compatibility and user options for connection management.
result.approach: Research the .moba file format, create a new MobaXTermDeserializer class to parse the file into the mRemoteNG ConnectionTreeModel, integrate the new deserializer into the application's import functionality (likely via FrmImport), and develop comprehensive unit tests for the deserializer.
